content: We can reframe curiosity-driven intrinsic reward methods (ICM, RND) as dynamic unsupervised curricula for active learning agent memory, where the agent’s own changing prediction error signals which new memory traces to encode and retain instead of relying on pre-specified acquisition functions. This creates a self-improving loop where curiosity not only drives exploration but actively grows and prunes the agent’s memory in line with its own uncertainty, eliminating the need for hand-designed active sampling rules.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
